meta.title: The Power of Collaboration to Secure Critical Infrastructure
meta.description:
This session reveals how leading cybersecurity companies are joining forces to create unified defenses that prevent attacks and protect the systems powering our industries and way of life. Through real-world examples, discover how integrated technologies are safeguarding oil rigs, refinery operations, and industrial processes from evolving cyber threats. 

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
